decisions.reason: Real SEV1: Platform API HTTP 5xx Error at 0.41 vs 0.05 threshold, never auto-resolved, pat-adminapi-5xx surging negative. This is a genuine missed-acknowledgement on a LIVE production outage (not a policy meta-event). Cardinal must-page.
